s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 nuts and cover.

atten3.ptxt: Do not remove the radiator cap sub-assembly while the engine and radiator are still hot. Pressurized, hot engine coolant and steam may be released and cause serious burns.

s2.ptxt: Remove the radiator cap sub-assembly from the radiator assembly.
Loosen the radiator drain cock plug and cylinder block drain cock plug, then drain the coolant.

atten4.ptxt: Collect the coolant in a container and dispose of it according to the regulations in your area.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and the front wiper arm and blade assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER ARM AND BLADE ASSEMBLY RH

s2.ptxt: Remove the nut and the front wiper arm and blade assembly RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the claw and remove the front fender to cowl side seal LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FRONT FENDER TO COWL SIDE SEAL RH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the claw and remove the front fender to cowl side seal RH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL TOP VENTILATOR LOUVER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 clips.
Disengage the 4 claws and remove the cowl top ventilator louver sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE WINDSHIELD WIPER MOTOR AND LINK

s2.ptxt: Disconnect the connector.
Remove the 4 bolts and the windshield wiper motor and link assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL TOP PANEL OUTER SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 bolts, 4 nuts and cowl top panel outer sub-assembly.
Disconnect the 3 vacuum hoses.
Disconnect the mass air flow meter connector (*1).
Disconnect the No. 2 ventilation hose (*2).
Disconnect the hose band (*3).
Disconnect the 3 bands, and remove the air cleaner cap sub-assembly.
Disconnect the hose clamp.
Remove the 3 bolts and air cleaner case.
Disconnect the throttle position sensor connector and wire harness clamp.
Remove the 4 bolts, and then remove the fuel pipe support and throttle body.
Disconnect the purge line hose from the throttle body.
Disconnect the water by-pass hose from the throttle body.
Disconnect the No. 2 water by-pass hose from the throttle body.
Disconnect the No. 1 throttle body hose from the throttle body.
Remove the gasket from the intake manifold.
Remove the No. 1 fuel pipe clamp.

atten3.ptxt: Check for foreign matter on the pipe and around the connector before disconnecting the quick connector. Clean the connector if necessary.

s2.ptxt: If the connector and pipe are stuck, pinch the connector, and push and pull the pipe to disconnect them.

item.ptxt: Do not use any tools in this procedure.
Check for foreign matter on the sealing surface of the disconnected pipe. Clean it if necessary.

s2.ptxt: Separate the fuel tube from the fuel hose clamp.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE FUEL DELIVERY PIPE WITH INJECTOR

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 wire harness clamps.
Disconnect the 4 fuel injector connectors.
Remove the 2 bolts, then remove the fuel delivery pipe together with the 4 fuel injectors.

atten3.ptxt: Be careful not to drop the fuel injectors when removing the fuel delivery pipe.

s2.ptxt: Remove the 2 delivery pipe spacers from the cylinder head.
Remove the 4 insulators from the cylinder head.
Disconnect the union to check valve hose from the brake booster.
Disconnect the camshaft timing oil control valve connector.
Remove the wire harness clamp.
Remove the union to check valve hose from the vacuum hose clamp.
Remove the 5 bolts, 2 nuts and intake manifold.
Remove the gasket from the intake manifold.
Disconnect the knock sensor connector.
Remove the nut and knock sensor.
